Test Case Description: Verify creating a new LDAP configuration with valid details (Server IP Protocol Port Domain Authentication)
Expected Result: LDAP configuration should be created successfully and saved without errors

Test Case Description: Verify updating an existing LDAP configuration with valid modified details
Expected Result: LDAP configuration should be updated successfully and changes should reflect

Test Case Description: Verify deleting an existing LDAP configuration
Expected Result: LDAP configuration should be deleted successfully and removed from the system

Test Case Description: Verify enabling LDAP configuration using the Enable toggle
Expected Result: LDAP authentication should be enabled and toggle should show ON state

Test Case Description: Verify disabling LDAP configuration using the Enable toggle
Expected Result: LDAP authentication should be disabled and toggle should show OFF state

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP protocol type selection with LDAP (port 389)
Expected Result: Protocol should be set to LDAP and port should default to 389

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP protocol type selection with LDAPS (port 636)
Expected Result: Protocol should be set to LDAPS and port should default to 636

Test Case Description: Verify authentication type selection as Simple
Expected Result: Authentication type should be set to Simple and username format should be user@domain

Test Case Description: Verify authentication type selection as NTLM
Expected Result: Authentication type should be set to NTLM and username format should be DOMAIN\\user

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form validation for Directory Domain field with valid FQDN
Expected Result: Valid FQDN should be accepted without errors

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form validation for Directory Domain field with invalid FQDN
Expected Result: Invalid FQDN should show appropriate validation error message

Test Case Description: Verify Server field accepts valid IP address (e.g. 10.71.16.55)
Expected Result: Valid server IP should be accepted and saved

Test Case Description: Verify Server field accepts valid hostname
Expected Result: Valid hostname should be accepted and saved

Test Case Description: Verify Server field rejects invalid IP address or hostname
Expected Result: Invalid IP/hostname should show validation error

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP enable and disable toggle functionality
Expected Result: Toggle should switch between enable and disable states correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Add Edit and Delete operations on LDAP configuration
Expected Result: All CRUD operations should work correctly

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP configuration page is accessible only for Admin and Super Admin users
Expected Result: Admin and Super Admin should access LDAP page; other roles should be restricted

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP configuration page is not accessible for Operator users
Expected Result: Operator user should not be able to access or modify LDAP configuration

Test Case Description: Verify Operator user can view but not modify LDAP settings
Expected Result: Operator user should have read-only access to LDAP page

Test Case Description: Verify SAML and LDAP cannot be enabled at the same time
Expected Result: System should prevent enabling both SAML and LDAP simultaneously and show an error

Test Case Description: Verify SAML authentication working and flow when LDAP is disabled
Expected Result: SAML login flow should work correctly when LDAP is disabled

Test Case Description: Verify login page after deleting LDAP authentication configuration
Expected Result: Login page should revert to default local login after LDAP deletion

Test Case Description: Verify login page after deleting SAML authentication configuration
Expected Result: Login page should revert to default local login after SAML deletion

Test Case Description: Verify login page domain selection dropdown validation for Super Admin user
Expected Result: Super Admin should see domain selection and be able to select the configured domain

Test Case Description: Verify forget password scenario when LDAP is enabled
Expected Result: Forget password functionality should behave correctly based on LDAP auth state

Test Case Description: Verify forget password scenario when SAML is enabled
Expected Result: Forget password functionality should behave correctly based on SAML auth state

Test Case Description: Verify Simple protocol username format (username@domain) in user page
Expected Result: Username should display in user@domain format for Simple authentication

Test Case Description: Verify NTLM protocol username format (DOMAIN\\username) in user page
Expected Result: Username should display in DOMAIN\\username format for NTLM authentication

Test Case Description: Verify password credential popup box and lock icon when SAML and LDAP are disabled
Expected Result: Password credential popup and lock icon should appear for local users when SAML/LDAP disabled

Test Case Description: Verify all Admin account functionality with LDAP enabled
Expected Result: Admin accounts should work correctly with LDAP authentication enabled

Test Case Description: Verify all Operator account functionality with LDAP enabled
Expected Result: Operator accounts should work correctly with LDAP authentication enabled

Test Case Description: Verify all Admin account functionality with SAML enabled
Expected Result: Admin accounts should work correctly with SAML authentication enabled

Test Case Description: Verify all Operator account functionality with SAML enabled
Expected Result: Operator accounts should work correctly with SAML authentication enabled

Test Case Description: Verify client ID and client secret credentials for Admin user
Expected Result: Admin user client ID and client secret should be valid and functional

Test Case Description: Verify client ID and client secret credentials for Operator user
Expected Result: Operator user client ID and client secret should be valid and functional

Test Case Description: Verify plan upload functionality for Admin and Operator users
Expected Result: Plan upload should work correctly for authorized users

Test Case Description: Verify reset password when LDAP is deleted or disabled
Expected Result: Reset password option should become available after LDAP is deleted/disabled

Test Case Description: Verify reset password when SAML is deleted or disabled
Expected Result: Reset password option should become available after SAML is deleted/disabled

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP configuration form validation with all mandatory fields empty
Expected Result: Form should show validation errors for all required fields

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP configuration form validation with partial mandatory fields filled
Expected Result: Form should show validation errors for missing required fields

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form rejects script tags in Server IP field (XSS prevention)
Expected Result: Script tags should be rejected and appropriate error should display

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form rejects script tags in Directory Domain field (XSS prevention)
Expected Result: Script tags should be rejected and appropriate error should display

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form rejects script tags in Base DN field (XSS prevention)
Expected Result: Script tags should be rejected and appropriate error should display

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form rejects script tags in Port field (XSS prevention)
Expected Result: Script tags should be rejected and appropriate error should display

Test Case Description: Verify Port field accepts valid port numbers only
Expected Result: Valid port numbers should be accepted; invalid values should be rejected

Test Case Description: Verify LDAPS configuration with valid TLS certificate uploaded
Expected Result: LDAPS should connect successfully with valid TLS certificate

Test Case Description: Verify LDAPS configuration without TLS certificate
Expected Result: System should show appropriate warning or error when TLS certificate is missing for LDAPS

Test Case Description: Verify LDAPS configuration with invalid TLS certificate
Expected Result: System should reject invalid TLS certificate and show error message

Test Case Description: Verify LDAPS configuration with expired TLS certificate
Expected Result: System should reject expired TLS certificate and show appropriate error

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP (non-SSL) configuration does not require TLS certificate
Expected Result: TLS certificate field should not be mandatory when protocol is LDAP

Test Case Description: Verify enabling Auto-Provisioning option
Expected Result: Auto-Provisioning should be enabled and provisioning scope options should appear

Test Case Description: Verify disabling Auto-Provisioning option
Expected Result: Auto-Provisioning should be disabled and provisioning scope options should be hidden

Test Case Description: Verify selecting All Authenticated Users provisioning scope
Expected Result: All users who authenticate via LDAP should be auto-provisioned regardless of group

Test Case Description: Verify selecting Group-Based Access provisioning scope
Expected Result: Only users belonging to specified AD groups should be auto-provisioned

Test Case Description: Verify All Authenticated Users scope with Admin user type
Expected Result: Admin users should be auto-provisioned correctly via all authenticated users scope

Test Case Description: Verify All Authenticated Users scope with Operator user type
Expected Result: Operator users should be auto-provisioned correctly via all authenticated users scope

Test Case Description: Verify All Authenticated Users scope with Guest user type
Expected Result: Guest users should be auto-provisioned correctly via all authenticated users scope

Test Case Description: Verify All Authenticated Users scope with Auditor user type
Expected Result: Auditor users should be auto-provisioned correctly via all authenticated users scope

Test Case Description: Verify Group-Based Access scope with Admin user type
Expected Result: Admin users in specified group should be auto-provisioned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Group-Based Access scope with Operator user type
Expected Result: Operator users in specified group should be auto-provisioned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Group-Based Access scope with Guest user type
Expected Result: Guest users in specified group should be auto-provisioned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Group-Based Access scope with Auditor user type
Expected Result: Auditor users in specified group should be auto-provisioned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Base DN field with default CN=Users folder in Windows AD
Expected Result: Base DN should resolve CN=Users correctly from Active Directory

Test Case Description: Verify Base DN field with customized OU folder path in Windows AD
Expected Result: Custom Base DN (e.g. OU=CustomOU DC=domain DC=com) should resolve correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Base DN field with invalid DN path
Expected Result: Invalid Base DN should show appropriate error or fail to authenticate

Test Case Description: Verify enabling Use Service Account toggle
Expected Result: Service Account Username and Password fields should become visible and mandatory

Test Case Description: Verify disabling Use Service Account toggle
Expected Result: Service Account Username and Password fields should be hidden

Test Case Description: Verify Service Account with valid AD username and password
Expected Result: Service account should authenticate successfully against AD

Test Case Description: Verify Service Account with invalid username
Expected Result: Service account authentication should fail with appropriate error message

Test Case Description: Verify Service Account with invalid password
Expected Result: Service account authentication should fail with appropriate error message

Test Case Description: Verify Service Account Username field rejects script tags (XSS prevention)
Expected Result: Script tags should be rejected and appropriate error should display

Test Case Description: Verify Service Account Password field rejects script tags (XSS prevention)
Expected Result: Script tags should be rejected and appropriate error should display

Test Case Description: Verify Service Account with custom/non-existent username
Expected Result: Custom or non-existent username should not be allowed and should show error

Test Case Description: Verify Service Account with custom/invalid password
Expected Result: Custom or invalid password should not be allowed and should show error

Test Case Description: Verify creating a new Group Access Policy using Add Access Policy button
Expected Result: New group access policy should be created with Group Name Role and Cluster Permissions

Test Case Description: Verify editing an existing Group Access Policy
Expected Result: Group access policy should be updated successfully with modified values

Test Case Description: Verify deleting an existing Group Access Policy
Expected Result: Group access policy should be deleted and removed from the list

Test Case Description: Verify Group Access Policy with Admin role assignment
Expected Result: Group should be assigned Admin role and users in it should get Admin permissions

Test Case Description: Verify Group Access Policy with Operator role assignment
Expected Result: Group should be assigned Operator role and users in it should get Operator permissions

Test Case Description: Verify Group Access Policy with Auditor role assignment
Expected Result: Group should be assigned Auditor role and users in it should get Auditor permissions

Test Case Description: Verify Group Access Policy with Guest role assignment
Expected Result: Group should be assigned Guest role and users in it should get Guest permissions

Test Case Description: Verify Group Name field rejects script tags (XSS prevention)
Expected Result: Script tags in Group Name should be rejected with validation error

Test Case Description: Verify Group Name field with valid AD group name
Expected Result: Valid AD group name should be accepted and mapped correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Group Name field with invalid or non-existent AD group name
Expected Result: Invalid group name should show error or fail during authentication

Test Case Description: Verify Cluster Permissions assignment in Group Access Policy
Expected Result: Cluster permissions should be assigned correctly per group policy

Test Case Description: Verify multiple Group Access Policies with different roles
Expected Result: Multiple groups with different roles should co-exist and function independently

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP user login with valid AD username and password
Expected Result: User should login successfully and land on appropriate dashboard based on role

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP user login with valid AD username and invalid password
Expected Result: Login should fail with invalid credentials error message

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP user login with invalid AD username
Expected Result: Login should fail with invalid credentials error message

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP user login with valid AD username and password on Linux
Expected Result: User should login successfully and land on appropriate dashboard based on role

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP user login with valid AD username and invalid password on Linux
Expected Result: Login should fail with invalid credentials error message

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP user login with invalid AD username on Linux
Expected Result: Login should fail with invalid credentials error message

Test Case Description: Verify Save button saves LDAP configuration successfully
Expected Result: Configuration should be saved and persist after page reload

Test Case Description: Verify Delete button removes LDAP configuration with confirmation
Expected Result: LDAP configuration should be deleted after user confirms the action

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form rejects SQL injection in Server field
Expected Result: SQL injection strings should be rejected with validation error

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form rejects SQL injection in Directory Domain field
Expected Result: SQL injection strings should be rejected with validation error

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP form rejects special characters in Server field
Expected Result: Special characters should be rejected with validation error

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP connection test with valid Server IP and port
Expected Result: Connection test should succeed and show success message

Test Case Description: Verify LDAP connection test with unreachable Server IP
Expected Result: Connection test should fail with timeout or unreachable error
